']' drawer toggle fires behind an open modal dialog (not inert)

F-chrome-01 S3: CommandPalette crashes app to error boundary on EVERY open and close (Rendered more/fewer hooks — useCommandRunner() called after early return at CommandPalette.tsx:178/280). Try again recovers but leaves blank main pane and swallows palette-initiated navigation.

F-chrome-02 S3: Cmd+1..6 nav hotkeys do not navigate — setActiveView is store-only, router URL never changes (no store→URL sync; LocationSync is one-way). Sidenav highlight moves while content stays. Same root cause kills palette quick-start launches, entity Go-to nav, Open-in-Recovery and View-order deep links.

F-chrome-03 S3: Toast actions (Copy details / Open in Recovery / View order / View bill) never render — _pendingCallContext in useCommandRunner.ts is a render-scoped local; the isPending re-render nulls it before onSuccess/onError. Verified missing in success, thrown-error and refusal toasts.
F-chrome-04 S2: raw zod JSON dumped into error toast (run Log payment from palette with no payload).
F-chrome-05 S2: queries.relatedCommands 500s — drawer History tabs (PO, lot) and RowInspector related-commands show Database error.
F-chrome-06 S2: queries.selectionSupportPacket 500s — Export support packet button silently does nothing (no download, no error UI).
F-chrome-07 S2: filters.getFacets 500s every time the Advanced filters builder opens — enum value dropdowns (Select category…) have no options.

F-chrome-08 S2: inventory inline editing dead — dblclick/Enter never opens editor; pageerror TypeError: Cannot assign to read only property availableQty (frozen row objects). Paste toasts 2 rows pasted and Cmd+D fill-down toasts Adjusted … by 0 while cell values never change; fill-handle drag silently no-ops.

F-chrome-09 S2: drawer digit hotkeys mismatch numbered tabs — tabForIndex (Hotkeys.tsx) uses stale per-view lists: clients digit2→Profile(labelled 3), digit5→Notes(labelled 7); vendors digits 2-4 all land on Details; Timeline unreachable by key on clients/orders/inventory.

F-chrome-10 S2: drawer tabs without dedicated renderers fall back to identical generic body — orders Lines/Customer/Output/History identical; payments Allocations/Customer/Impact/History identical; clients Profile/Balance/Purchases/Notes/History identical.
F-chrome-11 S1: one Esc closes two layers — shortcuts overlay focus-trap AND global handler both consume the same Esc, collapsing overlay and drawer together.
F-chrome-12 S1: ] and ? hotkeys fire behind open modal dialogs (drawer toggles, overlay opens); only command hotkeys are dialog-guarded. Cmd+3 during a dialog closes the dialog without navigating.
F-chrome-13 S2: /fulfillment pick grid re-renders continuously — row DOM replaced 10/10 half-second probes with zero network traffic; clicks land on detached elements.
F-chrome-14 S1: inventory grid subtitle row count ignores free-text quick filter (NF-002 filters grid to 1 row, subtitle still 173 row(s)); token filters update it.
F-chrome-15 S1: orders mixed-status selection renders no reason chip (catch-all rule), only generic toast on Cmd+Enter; catch-all More tray itself works with full verb set.
F-chrome-16 S1: viewer dashboard fires manager-only queries.creditWatchlist → 403 noise; palette lists operator+ commands to viewer (clickable, cleanly refused server-side).
F-chrome-17 S1: F focus-mode toggle produces no visible layout change on sales/inventory — only the SR announcement Focus mode on.

F-chrome-18 S0: registry drift — drawer cycle has 4th Peek state (overlay says standard→wide→focus); Alt+M works on all views but listed under Sales; Cmd+D fill-down works in grids but listed only under Intake.
